title: spathelia belizensis
intro: Spathelia belizensis, also known as the "Belmopan Spathelia" or "Orange Spathelia," is a plant species native to Belize. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, among others. In herbal preparations, Spathelia belizensis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
